title: Latvian government seriously shaken by drone incidents
summary_full: The drones in Latvian territory led not only to the resignation of Defence Minister Andris Sprūds (Progressives), but also to the de facto collapse of Evika Siliņa's (New Unity) government. Progressives announced on Wednesday that they no longer support Siliņa; politicians are beginning talks on the way forward, while the opposition is already prepared to lead a transitional government until the Saeima elections in the fall.
